quotes: The wound is the place where the light enters you.
Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.
The universe is change; our life is what our thoughts make it.
The earth has music for those who listen.
The trees are our elders, they have seen it all.
The snowflake falls, and the flower blooms, each in its own time.
In the depth of winter, I finally learned that within me there lay an invincible summer.
The deepest wisdom is rooted in darkness, yet it blossoms in light.
The soul is not a thing, it is a flame that flickers with every breath.
The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.
The winter of our discontent is also the season of our transformation.
The tree that bends in the storm is stronger than the tree that resists.
The stars are the map of our destiny, and the universe is the compass that guides us.
The soul's journey is not a path, it is a landscape that unfolds with every step.
The gentleness of a summer breeze can uproot the deepest sorrow.
In the depths of our being, a spark of gentleness glows, waiting to illuminate the darkness.
Gentleness is the bridge that spans the chasm between our hearts and the universe.
The delicate petal of gentleness can weather the fiercest of storms.
Gentleness is the fire that forges the strongest bonds between human hearts.
In the darkest depths, a gentle whisper can summon the light.
The gentle breeze that stirs the sand can also stir the soul.
The stillness of the mind is the mirror of the soul.
The darkness is not something to be feared, but something to be illuminated.
The universe is a single, undivided whole, and we are all part of it.
The fleeting nature of life is what makes it so precious.
The fire that burns within us is the same fire that burns in the universe.
The depths of the ocean are a mirror to the depths of our own soul.
The vast expanse of the desert is a reminder of the vastness of our own potential.
Sorrow prepares you for joy. It violently sweeps away the rust and the dust that hides the door of your heart.
The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.
The soul should always stand ajar, ready to welcome the ecstatic experience.
And the day came when the risk to remain tight in a bud was more painful than the risk it took to blossom.
The greatest wealth is to live content with little.
In all things, there is something of everything.
To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
The heart is a sea, and love is its only harbor.
The universe is not a collection of distinct objects, but a continuum, where everything is connected.
The beauty of life is its impermanence.
We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
The world is a book, and those who do not travel read only one page.
In the stillness of the quiet, if we listen, we can hear the whisper of the heart.
The darkness is to space what silence is to sound; the interval between the notes gives the music its beauty.
The highest wisdom and truth are like the purest liquids which hide themselves in the deepest wells.
The soul is dyed with the color of its thoughts; think only of those things that will bear the light of scrutiny.
The winter of our lives is not a season of barrenness, but a time of quiet and contemplation, when the seeds of our deepest desires take root.
The universe is a vast and wondrous tapestry, woven from the threads of light and darkness, and we are all a part of its intricate design.
The fire that burns within us is the same fire that forged the mountains and the stars; it is the spark of creation, and the flame of our deepest passions.
The depths of our souls are like the ocean, dark and mysterious, yet filled with hidden treasures and untold wonders, waiting to be discovered.
